ground_truth.title: Best Long-Distance & Cross-Country Moving Companies 2026
ground_truth.author: Rebecca Edwards
ground_truth.main_content: We've spent nearly a decade researching and testing long-distance movers to find companies that deliver fair pricing, reliable service, and fewer moving-day surprises. Allied Van Lines is our top overall pick, with strong alternatives like Colonial Van Lines, United Van Lines, American Van Lines, and Mayzlin for different budgets and priorities. Want a faster answer? Use our Find-a-Mover tool to compare personalized estimates from the movers that best fit your move. Allied Van Lines stands out for its convenience, offering virtual in-home estimates and being one of the few moving companies that doesn't require a deposit. Colonial Van Lines provides highly trained movers with a dedicated account manager. American Van Lines offers the best overall value with flat rates and 24/7 customer service. United Van Lines requires no deposit and provides binding quotes with shipment tracking. Mayzlin offers the best discounts with price matching and low deposits. The page includes a comparison table showing average quotes ($5,750-$9,000 for a 3-bedroom cross-country move), deposit requirements (none to 50%), and service availability across 40-50 states.
with: Allied Van Lines is our top overall pick, with strong alternatives like Colonial Van Lines, United Van Lines, American Van Lines, and Mayzlin for different budgets and priorities.
Allied Van Lines stands out for its convenience, offering virtual in-home estimates and being one of the few moving companies that doesn't require a deposit.
Colonial Van Lines provides highly trained movers with a dedicated account manager and up to $500 discount.
American Van Lines offers the best overall value with flat rates, 24/7 customer service, and vetted movers.
The page compares average quotes ranging from $5,750 to $9,000 for a 3-bedroom cross-country move, with deposit requirements from none to 50%.
